t.t: View and manage your alumni profile details

div.p: Manage your personal information, employment and achievements

div.class: card-header bg-white border-bottom pt-3 pb-3 px-4
card-header bg-white border-bottom pt-3 pb-3 px-4

div.p: Manage your employment records here. Unverified records await administration confirmation.

div.class: table-responsive bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-light

td.p: Click "Add Employment" to add your work history.

h6.style: color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;
color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;

button.class: btn btn-ap-save rounded-pill px-4 shadow-sm font-weight-bold

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-success text-white' if employment.verification_status == 'verified' else 'badge-ap-gold' if employment.verification_status in ['pending_verification', 'draft'] else 'bg-secondary text-white' }} rounded-pill fs-6

div.p: Showcase your notable honors, certifications, and publications.

div.class: table-responsive bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-light

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border py-1 px-2 fs-6

td.p: Click "Add Achievement" to showcase your honors.

h6.style: color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;
color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Briefly describe what this achievement is about...

button.class: btn btn-ap-save rounded-pill px-4 shadow-sm font-weight-bold

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border me-2 py-1 px-2 fs-6

div.p: The employment record has been verified successfully.

h6.style: color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;
color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;

button.class: btn btn-ap-save rounded-pill px-4 shadow-sm font-weight-bold

h6.style: color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;

input.name: title
input.placeholder: e.g. Employee of the Year or Published Paper

h6.style: color:#1a365d; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:0;

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Briefly describe what this achievement is about...

button.class: btn btn-ap-save rounded-pill px-4 shadow-sm font-weight-bold
